narrative:
Bowling Green 3-E (precinct in Wood County) has 1,392 registered voters, with 43.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.9%, a clear Republican lean of 8.8 percentage points.
